title: loeseliastrum franciscanum
intro: Loeseliastrum franciscanum, also known as Franciscan mint or Franciscan lobelia, is a flowering plant in the borage family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant's health benefits also include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. Loeseliastrum franciscanum can be prepared for consumption through various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being.
